prompt: Create an original app icon for an empathetic AI companion: a single luminous rounded speech-bubble symbol whose negative space subtly suggests a calm face and a soft audio waveform. Strong simple silhouette, generous padding, readable at 32px, premium and emotionally warm rather than corporate.
style: minimal vector-like app icon with refined flat geometry and restrained soft glow
composition: single centered symbol inside a rounded-square midnight-indigo tile, generous margin, balanced negative space
palette: deep navy and indigo base, luminous cyan and lilac, one restrained warm coral highlight
constraints: original design; no letters; no words; no people; no mockup; no device frame; no trademark; no watermark
negative: busy details, clip art, mascot, text, photorealism

prompt: A cinematic editorial homepage photograph for an empathetic AI virtual companion. One young East Asian adult sits in a quiet contemporary room at blue hour, naturally engaged in conversation with a subtle abstract virtual presence made of soft light near a laptop; the moment feels attentive, grounded, and human, not futuristic spectacle.
scene: quiet modern interior at blue hour with a window and minimal furnishings
subject: one casually dressed young East Asian adult in a natural three-quarter pose, subtle abstract companion glow, realistic skin and fabric texture
style: premium photorealistic editorial lifestyle photography, subtle film grain
composition: wide landscape, human placed slightly right of center, clean visual breathing room, no UI text
lighting: soft indigo ambient light with cyan edge light and a restrained warm coral practical lamp
palette: deep navy, indigo, cyan, lilac, warm coral accents
constraints: one human only; natural anatomy and hands; no visible brand; no readable screen content; no text; no watermark
negative: cyberpunk neon overload, humanoid robot, stock-photo smile, plastic skin, floating letters
